[]: Need help to identify which scene: Rei in uniform             Quote Post by anteaterneo » Sun May 17, 2020 4:28 pm Hello there: I recently came across the opportunity to purchase this beautiful cel of Rei in uniform. I watched the whole series plus two movies couple times, tried to locate the exact scene of this cel but without any luck. Any inputs from you guys is much appreciated. Regards Ken https://www.facebook.com/photo.php?fbid=3289718447706512&set=pcb.10159130325059587&type=3&theater&ifg=1
